mapper.select:
select
from mycase_case_backup where case_id = #{caseId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_delete = 0 order by id desc limit 1
mapper.delete: update mycase_case_backup set is_delete =1 where case_id = #{case_id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_delete = 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id
insert into mycase_case_backup
id,
case_id,
title,
creator,
gmt_created,
case_content,
case_content_blob,
record_content,
extra,
is_delete,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{caseId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{gmtCreated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{caseContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{caseContentBlob,jdbcType=BLOB},
#{recordContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{extra,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
